title: Business Development Executive
description:
Polaris is a customised career coaching service that helps professionals and enterprises in Singapore gain clarity, improve their confidence, and progress in their careers

We are looking for a high-energy, target-driven individual to bring our workforce and talent solutions into Singapore’s enterprise market. This is a role for someone who loves the thrill of opening doors — cold calling, prospecting, networking, and building strong relationships with HR and business leaders.

Key Responsibilities

·       Proactively generate leads through cold calls, LinkedIn outreach, business events, and industry networking.

·       Build a strong pipeline of Singapore enterprise prospects across multiple sectors.

·       Research employer needs, HR challenges, and talent gaps to position Polaris effectively.

·       Active engagement with HR & Business Leaders

·       Conduct meetings with HR Directors, TA Leads, L&D Managers, and senior stakeholders.

·       Present Polaris’ solutions with clarity, confidence, and strong storytelling.

·       Understand workforce challenges and propose customised solutions.

·       Manage & Grow Enterprise Accounts

·       Build long-term relationships through consistent communication and exceptional follow-up.

·       Ensure high customer satisfaction and repeat business from existing enterprise clients.

·       Identify opportunities to upsell and cross-sell Polaris programs and services.

·       Deliver results by meeting monthly and quarterly targets.

·       Keep CRM updated with activities, pipeline progress, and client engagements.

Requirements

·       1–3 years of experience in B2B sales, enterprise sales, recruitment sales, or HR/training solutions.

·       Comfortable with cold calling and initiating conversations with decision-makers.

·       Strong communication, pitching, and presentation skills.

·       Confident, polished, and able to connect with HR leaders professionally.

·       Highly target-driven, self-motivated, and resilient — you enjoy the chase and the win.

·       Excellent account management and relationship-building skills.

·       Strong follow-up discipline and attention to detail.

·       Able to work independently in a fast-moving environment.

If you’re confident, persuasive, and passionate about helping companies build stronger talent pipelines, we want to hear from you soon.

postedCompany.description:
INGEUS PTE. LTD.


Ingeus Pte Ltd , a part of Advanced Personnel Management (APM) group, has a global reach of more than 700 offices at 200 locations in 9 countries.


We are a trusted partner of Workforce Singapore (WSG), SG enable, Skills Future Singapore and Yellow Ribbon Project.


For 6 years we have placed more than 7,000 Singaporean's into work with our employment services. As part of the APM Group global human services provider, we proudly contribute to enabling better lives for more than 2 million people each year.


Our services in Singapore are tailored with Singaporeans and PMETs in mind. We aim to provide high-quality services to create a positive change to the Singapore labour market.


Ingeus is all about people. We take pride in delivering services that make a huge difference to people’s lives across globally. We believe that everyone has potential and that, given the right guidance, support and training, every individual can progress and reach greater height of success.


Everything we do is results-driven. The results we produce do not just benefit the clients we work with; the results also benefit their families, their communities, their employers and economy.
postedCompany.name: INGEUS PTE. LTD.
